name: Italian Spring Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix the water, vegetable oil, honey, and salt with the anise.
2. Add the yeast to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Gradually add the anise seeds and mix well.
4. Gradually add the bread flour, stirring continuously until a dough forms.
5. Turn off the heat and let the dough cool for 10 minutes.
6. In another bowl, mix the water, vegetable oil, honey, salt, and anise.
7. Add the yeast to the mixture and stir until combined.
8. Gradually add the anise seeds and mix well.
9. Gradually add the bread flour, stirring continuously until a dough forms.
10. Turn off the heat and let the dough cool for 10 minutes.
11. Mix in the golden raisins and knead the dough until incorporated.
12. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
13. Let the loaf rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
14. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
15. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing.
